GOBD Information

  • This section is under development and has not yet been validated or published. If you're seeing this online, please disregard the information below.

Aerodrome Data

ICAO GOBD
IATA DSS
Elevation 290 ft
Transition Altitude 3500 ft
Transition Level FL40
Mag Variation 07º W
Coordinate 14°40′16″N 17°4′1″W
Site dakaraeroport.com

Runways

Runway Heading TORA (m) TODA (m) ASDA (m) LDA (m) Remarks
01 006º 3500 3700 3620 3500 -
19 186º 3500 3600 3620 3500 -

Aprons

Apron Type Entry / Exit Remarks
Apron G General Aviation Twy G -
Apron J1 Remote Stands Twy A4 -
Apron J2 Remote Stands Twy A2 -
Apron N Overflow/ Remote Twy A1 -
Apron T Main Terminal Twy A3 -
Apron V Cargo Twy C8 -
Apron VIP VIP Twy P -

Positions & Frequencies

Position Callsign Frequency Remarks
GOBD_ATIS Diass ATIS 120.500 -
GOBD_DEL Diass Delivery 122.100 VATSIM Only
GOBD_GND Diass Ground 121.800 -
GOBD_TWR Diass Tower 118.800 -
GOBD_APP Diass Approach 120.500 -
GOOO_CTR Dakar Control 129.500 -

Airspace

Airspace Class Owner Limits Remarks
Dakar-Diass CTR D GOBD_TWR GND - FL045 -
Dakar-Diass TMA D GOBD_APP FL045 - FL145 -
Dakar-Diass TMA A GOBD_APP FL145 - FL245 -
Dakar FIR/UIR A GOOO_CTR FL245 - UNL -

GOBD Delivery

IFR Clearance Rules

Cruise Level Rules

RVSM (feet)
EVEN IFR ODD
180º to 359º IFR 360º to 179º
020, 040, 060, 080, 100 010, 030, 050, 070, 090
120, 140, 160, 180, 200 110, 130, 150, 170, 190
220, 240, 260, 280, 300 210, 230, 250, 270, 290
320, 340, 360, 380, 400 310, 330, 350, 370, 390
430, 470, 510, 550, 590 410, 450, 490, 430, 570
180º to 359º VFR 360º to 179º
045, 065, 085, 105 035, 055, 075, 095
125, 145 115, 135
  • The VFR flights are not allowed over and above the flight level 150 (DOC 7030 ICAO).

GOBD Ground

  • This section is under development and has not yet been validated or published. If you're seeing this online, please disregard the information below.

Push-back Procedures

Phraseology
CALLSIGN, push-back approved, facing DIRECTION.
Directions
Apron Type Facing Remarks
- - - -

Taxi Out Procedures

Phraseology
CALLSIGN, taxi via taxiway CHARLIE to holding point CHARLIE SEVEN.

Taxi In Procedures

Phraseology
CALLSIGN, welcome to Dakar. Taxi to STAND ALPHA SEVEN via taxiway CHARLIE, ALPHA THREE.

01 Left Up to 1000 AFL -

NE E3-TS 1000 ft Left Circuit before E3

SE E3-S1 1000 ft Left Circuit before E3
S E3-SN 1000 ft Left Circuit before E3
W SW-W2 1000 ft -

Sector Entry Procedure Altitude Remarks
N NG-NK-N1-SW 1500 ft -
W W2-SW 1000 ft -

S S2-E3 1000 ft -
VFR Transitions
Visual Reference Points
Code Designation VOR & Radial Distance Remarks
NG NOVEMBER GOLF DS 017º 20.8 -
N1 NOVEMBER ONE DS 329º 14.6 -
NK NOVEMBER KILO DS 357º 16.5 -
E3 ECHO THREE DS 085º 3.3 -
E4 ECHO FOUR DS 077º 20.8 -
S1 SIERRA ONE DS 124º 21.1 -
W2 WHISKEY TWO DS 290º 21.3 -
SW SIERRA WHISKEY DS 275º 6.2 -
E5 ECHO FIVE DS 047º 21.4 -
SN SIERRA NOVEMBER DS 163º 7.3 -
E2 ECHO TWO DS 165º 18.5 -
TS TANGO SIERRA DS 056º 8.8 -
SN and S2 are reserved for arrivals and departures to Saly Airfield.
E5 is reserved for arrivals and departures to This Military Aerodrome.

Helicopter Operations

  • TLOF is available on TWY M, next to the threshold of RWY 19.
